translation: def isOs(family: str, name: str, arch: str, version: str) -> bool:
if family or name or arch or version:
is9x = OS.__OS_NAME.find("95") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("98") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("me") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("ce") != -1
isFamily = OS.__PATH_SEP == ":" and not OS.__isFamily(OS.FAMILY_VMS) and (not OS.__isFamily(OS.FAMILY_MAC) or OS.__OS_NAME.endswith("x") or OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.__DARWIN) != -1)
raise ValueError(f"Don't know how to detect OS family {family}")
retValue = isFamily and isName and isArch and isVersion
raise NotImplementedError("Cannot create an instance of OS")

body: private static final String PATH_SEP = File.pathSeparator;
